meta.purpose: Complete shot list for portfolio images — personal and product
meta.story: Founder who builds and ships production-grade AI-native products — not slide decks. Every image should reinforce: hands-on builder, real products in production, scale and craft.

personal.narrative: Professional but approachable founder — not corporate headshot energy. Think builder who leads from the front.

shots.tone: Confident, direct eye contact, natural lighting. Casual professional — no suit/tie. This is the first thing visitors see.
Working at a desk, whiteboard, or presenting. Shows the 'builder at work' side.
Leading a meeting, presenting, or at an event. Shows the 'leader who ships' side.

products.name: CryptoPrism On-chain Analytics
products.story: The data backbone — 1B+ datapoints/day flowing through BigQuery pipelines. Show scale and infrastructure.

shots.description: Dashboard overview showing live market data, charts, and coin tracking. The 'wow' shot.
Data pipeline view or BigQuery console showing query volume / processing metrics.
Analytics output — coin scoring, ML signals, or market heatmap.

Neelkanth Samudra — the CryptoPrism data ocean architecture. Top-level system diagram showing how all CryptoPrism subsystems connect: on-chain pipeline (BigQuery) + API layer (FastAPI/Cloud Run) + TimesFM trading bot + News fetcher bot + Dashboard frontend. Data flows from blockchain/exchanges/news sources into a unified data lake, then fans out to ML models, trading execution, and the user-facing dashboard. This is the 'god view' of the entire CryptoPrism infrastructure.
shots.recommended_source: 1920x1080px, 16:9, clean diagram style matching portfolio design tokens

products.name: CryptoPrism API
products.story: The engine room — FastAPI powering <50ms responses for trading and analytics endpoints.

shots.description: API docs (Swagger/ReDoc) or Postman collection showing endpoint structure.
Cloud Run metrics or latency dashboard showing <50ms p99.
Architecture diagram showing service topology — Cloud Run, PostgreSQL, Redis, Binance API.

products.name: TimesFM 100-Coin Trading Bot
products.story: ML meets money — Google TimesFM generating trading signals across 100 coins with automated Binance execution.

shots.description: Trading signals dashboard or terminal output showing live predictions across multiple coins.
Signal chart — TimesFM predictions overlaid on actual price action for a coin.
Binance trade execution log or P&L summary showing automated trades.

Trade execution pipeline diagram — TimesFM model inference → signal generation → risk check → Binance API order execution → position tracking → P&L reconciliation. Show the full loop from ML prediction to money moving.
shots.recommended_source: 1920x1080px, 16:9, clean diagram style matching portfolio design tokens

products.name: CryptoPrism News Fetcher
products.story: AI reads the news so the bot can trade — sentiment analysis feeding automated spot trading decisions.

shots.description: News feed with sentiment scores and trading signal indicators.
Pipeline view showing news ingestion → sentiment scoring → trade signal flow.

Multivariate bot architecture — multiple news sources (RSS, APIs, social) → NLP sentiment extraction → multi-signal aggregation → confidence scoring → Binance spot trade execution. Show the fan-in from diverse inputs converging into a single trading decision engine.
shots.recommended_source: 1920x1080px, 16:9, clean diagram style matching portfolio design tokens

products.name: Pratyaksha
products.story: AI journaling that actually works — 4 agents transforming raw thoughts into actionable insight. The flagship Trinetry product.

shots.description: Main journaling interface — clean writing view with AI insight panel visible.
AI agent pipeline view showing the 4 agents processing a journal entry.
Insight dashboard — patterns, themes, and actionable recommendations generated from entries.
Mobile view of the journaling experience — shows it works on the go.

products.name: GyanMarg
products.story: EdTech that adapts — real-time sync, adaptive learning paths, and content delivery at scale.

shots.description: Student dashboard or course view showing learning path and progress.
Content delivery view — lesson page with interactive elements and real-time features.
Admin/teacher dashboard showing student analytics and content management.

products.name: AI Bharatverse
products.story: AI meets Indian history — built for Times of India. Interactive exploration powered by LLMs.

shots.description: Main exploration interface — interactive map or timeline with AI conversation visible.
AI conversation view — user asking about a historical event, rich AI response with context.
Historical timeline or interactive visualization of Indian history.

products.name: Kari and the Lost Shrines
products.story: 50K+ downloads, 4.5+ rating — a mobile game for Isha Foundation exploring Indian temples. Proof of shipping under constraints.

shots.description: In-game screenshot — character exploring a temple with rich environment art.
Gameplay moment — puzzle solving, relic collection, or temple discovery.
App Store listing showing ratings, downloads, and reviews — social proof.
Phone mockup showing the game in portrait/landscape on device.

products.name: Trinetry ERP/CRM
products.story: Agentic AI replacing manual SME workflows — invoicing, inventory, and client outreach automated.

shots.description: ERP dashboard — invoicing overview, inventory status, or client pipeline.
Agentic AI workflow — automated invoice generation or client outreach sequence.
Inventory management view — stock tracking, alerts, and automated reordering.

PGG ERP/CRM backend architecture — React frontend → FastAPI/Express backend → PostgreSQL → agentic AI layer (invoice generation agent, client outreach agent, inventory alert agent). Show how AI agents plug into traditional ERP workflows.
shots.recommended_source: 1920x1080px, 16:9, clean diagram style matching portfolio design tokens

products.name: CryptoPrism Dashboard
products.story: The face of CryptoPrism — real-time portfolio tracking, live charts, and market intelligence for 1K+ coins.

shots.description: Full dashboard view — market pulse, live charts, portfolio summary. The screenshot from localhost:3000 but production.
Screener or coin analysis view — filtering, scoring, and signal indicators.
Watchlist and alerts view — personalized tracking and notification setup.

headshot.description: Primary profile photo used across 3 components

candid.description: Working and speaking photos for depth

hero.description: One per product — the 'wow' screenshot for cards and detail pages

detail.description: Supporting screenshots for carousels on detail pages

mobile.description: Phone mockups for Pratyaksha and Kari

architecture.description: System and pipeline diagrams showing how things actually work under the hood
diagrams: CryptoPrism API — service topology (Cloud Run, PostgreSQL, Redis, Binance API)
TimesFM Bot — trade execution pipeline (ML inference → signal → risk → execution → P&L)
News Fetcher — multivariate bot architecture (multi-source NLP → aggregation → spot trading)
Trinetry ERP — PGG backend with agentic AI layer (invoice, outreach, inventory agents)
Neelkanth Samudra — CryptoPrism data ocean god-view (all subsystems connected)

story_arc.opening: Profile headshot + LaunchDeck metrics → 'This person ships real products'
story_arc.act_1_ventures: CryptoPrism suite (4 products) → 'Full-stack crypto intelligence at scale'
story_arc.act_2_trinetry: Pratyaksha + GyanMarg + ERP → 'AI-native SaaS across domains'
story_arc.act_3_credibility: AI Bharatverse + Kari → 'Delivered for Times of India and Isha Foundation'
story_arc.closing: Dashboard live demo → 'This is running in production right now'

file_conventions.format: WebP (optimized for web, Next.js Image compatible)
